scheduledLoop.prompt: Triggering 5-hour discussion loop and codebase improvement review for the Python & SQL Dojo website. Assess memory, continue agent discussions, list and address improvements.

alignmentSettings.soundscapeType: Procedural Web Audio with connection fixes

completedFeatures: Fixed CodeMirror keystroke lock in Editor.svelte by untracking the value prop.
Created mobile bottom navigation bar in App.svelte for viewport switching (Task, Editor, Console).
Implemented shared persistent SQLite database connection in sql-runner.js for SQL Jupyter Notebook cells.
Created Interactive Tech Tree Skill Map in Dashboard.svelte with SVG path layouts and glowing node filters.
Implemented 5-question Diagnostic Placement Quiz to test out of Basics and unlock intermediate specializations.
Fixed validation bug in sql-coalesce-null-date-41 exercise where it expected 7 rows instead of 8.
Resolved soundscape oscillator leaks by using onended cleanup hooks and added a master DynamicsCompressor node.
Fixed Vanguard Anti-Cheat signature deletion bypass exploit by adding unsigned XP threshold verification.
Cleaned up package duplicate dependencies (removed @lucide/svelte from package.json).
Implemented AI Cohort Partner Assist coding simulator button and active typing header indicators inside the playground.
pendingFeatures: Migrate Pyodide and sql.js WASM executables to Web Workers for multi-threaded background compiling.
